description:
Read the contents of a text file.
- Returns file content (up to 2000 lines by default)
- Use offset and limit to page through large files
- This tool only reads files; use list for directories

filePath.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-indexed)

limit.description: Max number of lines to read (default 2000)
